viewContainer.title: Project Atlas
view.projects.name: Projects
view.recent.name: Recent
view.favorites.name: Favorites
view.tasks.name: Tasks
command.git-atlas.openMergeEditorFromSCM: Open in Git Atlas Merge Editor
description: Projects, tasks, and multi-repo git in one place.
config.title: Project Atlas
config.recentProjectsLimit: Maximum number of recent projects to display.
config.openProjectMode: How to open projects: 'ask' (prompt each time), 'currentWindow', or 'newWindow'.
config.openMode: Click behavior for opening a project (single click, double click, or follow IDE).
config.confirmDelete: Whether to confirm before deleting a project or group. 'ask' shows a confirmation dialog, 'never' deletes immediately.
config.showRevealActiveFile: Show 'Reveal Active File' button in the built-in file explorer view title.
config.taskAtlas.showRecentRuns: Show the 'Recent Runs' group at the top of the task list.
config.taskAtlas.maxRecentRuns: Maximum number of recently run tasks to display.
config.taskAtlas.showPinned: Show the 'Pinned' group at the top of the task list.
config.gitAtlas.commitListStyle: Commit list display style for Git Atlas.
config.gitAtlas.commitListStyle.vscode: VSCode style: two groups (Staged Changes / Changes) with hover actions.
config.gitAtlas.commitListStyle.jetbrain: JetBrains style: checkbox-based selection with separate groups.
config.gitAtlas.commitBadgeMode: How to show the change count badge on the Git Commit activity bar icon.
config.gitAtlas.commitBadgeMode.total: Sum of changes across all repositories.
config.gitAtlas.commitBadgeMode.current: Changes in the currently selected repository only.
config.gitAtlas.aiCommit.apiUrl: AI API base URL or full endpoint (OpenAI-compatible). Trailing /chat/completions is appended automatically if missing, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1 or https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4
config.gitAtlas.aiCommit.language.auto: Auto-detect from recent git commit history.
config.gitAtlas.aiCommit.maxDiffChars: Maximum diff characters sent to the AI. Longer diffs are truncated.
config.gitAtlas.aiCommit.customInstructi: Custom instructions appended to the AI prompt for commit message generation. E.g. 'Always include a JIRA ticket number' or 'Use Angular commit convention'.
config.gitAtlas.aiCommit.timeout: Timeout in seconds for AI commit message generation requests.
config.gitAtlas.enableGitLogPanel: Enable the Git Atlas panel (Git Log) in the bottom panel. Takes effect immediately, no reload required.
config.gitAtlas.enableCommitPanel: Enable the Commit panel in the activity bar. Takes effect immediately, no reload required.
command.git-atlas.setAiApiKey: Git Atlas: Set AI API Key
command.git-atlas.clearAiApiKey: Git Atlas: Clear AI API Key
